section_miscategorizations.text: I will also order a CMP level check every two months to monitor xeljanz levels.
section_miscategorizations.reason: CMP is a metabolic panel and does not measure Xeljanz (tofacitinib) levels; the action (ordering CMP) belongs in P, but the stated purpose is clinically inaccurate rather than a sectioning issue. No clear statement in this note is placed in a wrong SOAP section.
